component.name: Audra
component.summary: Native music player with Last.fm scrobbling

description.p: Audra is a native music player for Linux built with GTK4 and libadwaita. It plays your local library and integrates with Last.fm for automatic scrobbling.

ul.li: Local music library with cover art

description.p: Track lists gain a per-row play/pause icon and hover affordance, with a clearer now-playing row highlight. Adds the Remix icon set and macOS (Apple Silicon) support, plus album-art and library fixes.
Dynamic album-art background: the window now blends several colors extracted from the cover, inspired by Amberol.
Fix audio continuing in background on language change, Windows SMTC improvements, and AppImage packaging.
Windows media controls improvements, packaging refinements, and code quality pass.
Redesigned player bar, cover and artist photo picker with online search, library deduplication, and reset library action.
